# Application Endpoint Group (EPG)

## Get EPGs properties

Use '--view props' to get properties of selected epgs
- epg name, application profile and tenant
- preferred member
- flood
- class id
- QoS class
- isolation
- label match

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.view_properties:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.view_properties:devel.debug
```
